experiments.name: Final qpose/tile-action variant
experiments.lesson: Stable temporal behavior; conservative tile corrections preserve PoseNet.

experiments.name: Lossless temporal-delta mask codec
experiments.lesson: Simple temporal delta coding was substantially larger than the original mask stream.

experiments.name: Simple arithmetic mask codec
experiments.lesson: Hand-written spatial/temporal contexts were still worse than the existing representation.

experiments.name: Lossy mask re-encode CRF50
experiments.lesson: Small byte savings were overwhelmed by temporal distortion.

experiments.name: Lossy mask re-encode CRF60
experiments.lesson: Excellent rate reduction, but catastrophic PoseNet degradation.

experiments.name: Aggressive keyframe/g=1 mask re-encode
experiments.lesson: Larger archive and severe temporal failure.
